description.value: Your intellectual grasp of magical structures lets you find the flaws in enemy weaves before they can fully form.

system.benefits:
Once per round, when a creature within 60 feet begins casting a Complex Weave (2-action cast), you may use a [Reaction] to study the forming weave. Make an [[/check skill=arcane]] (Int + Arcana, opposed by caster's Int or Wis + Arcana):

  • 1 success: Impose Misfortune on their weaving roll
  • 2 successes: Impose Misfortune on both their weaving roll and their targeting roll
